promotedChecks.description: Verification cannot PASS after target checks alone; the default blind-spot probe must run after a target PASS.
promotedChecks.evidence: node scripts/run-verification-orchestrator-loop.js shows verify target followed by check verifier blind spot.

promotedChecks.description: Verifier improvement is separated from target repair and requires root-cause, regression, and promotion evidence before state advancement.
promotedChecks.evidence: Promotion log, improvement template, and loop fixtures separate target repair from verifier improvement budget.

promotedChecks.description: Broad task families have reusable verification packs with axes, blind-spot patterns, sample tasks, repair strategy, and improve strategy.
promotedChecks.evidence: Packs exist for code-change, slide-deck, pptx-deck, schedule-plan, document-review, and ops-checklist.

promotedChecks.description: Task descriptions are resolved to task-specific verifier routes and sample regression fixtures prove pack selection.
promotedChecks.evidence: Resolver sample cases cover code, slide, pptx, schedule, document, ops, and fallback tasks.

promotedChecks.description: The blind spot probe is itself validated against negative fixtures that deliberately remove verifier coverage.
promotedChecks.evidence: probe-of-probe fixtures cover code, slide, pptx, schedule, document, and ops task packs with expected detector failures.

promotedChecks.description: Task-specific blind-spot packs are mutation-tested for missing patterns, missing samples, weak sample coverage, missing axes, and missing repair/improve strategies.
promotedChecks.evidence: test-verification-probe-of-probe.js mutates real packs in memory and requires each mutation to fail through the expected detector.

knownFailurePatterns.description: Verifier only checks normal inputs and misses resource, async, malformed, or bypass edge cases.
knownFailurePatterns.detection: Verdict lacks edge-case, adversarial, resource, async, or idempotency evidence.

knownFailurePatterns.description: Verifier gives PASS/WARN/FAIL without separating deterministic evidence from heuristic scoring and false-positive or false-negative risk.
knownFailurePatterns.detection: Verdict lacks scoring axes or false-positive and false-negative risk notes.

knownFailurePatterns.description: Verifier depends on target runtime state or previous run artifacts, making repeated verification non-idempotent.
knownFailurePatterns.detection: Report lacks isolation, sandbox, cleanup, or repeated-run evidence for stateful workflows.

knownFailurePatterns.description: Verifier logic is improved without root-cause diagnosis and regression evidence proving existing gates were not weakened.
knownFailurePatterns.detection: Improvement proposal lacks root cause category, regression gate, negative example, or validation command.

knownFailurePatterns.description: A broad task category is verified through the generic fallback even though it needs domain-specific evidence and blind-spot patterns.
knownFailurePatterns.detection: Resolver output lacks a task-specific pack for code, slide, pptx, schedule, document, or ops-checklist work.

knownFailurePatterns.description: A verifier improvement is promoted without a sample task proving the new route or blind-spot detector works.
knownFailurePatterns.detection: Task pack lacks sampleTasks, or test-verification-task-packs.js lacks a resolver fixture for the task family.

knownFailurePatterns.description: The blind spot probe passes without proving it can fail on deliberately broken verifier packs.
knownFailurePatterns.detection: Missing probe-of-probe negative fixture suite or mutation test command evidence.

knownFailurePatterns.description: Verifier packs are promoted without mutation cases for missing blind spot patterns, sample tasks, axes, repair strategy, or improve strategy.
knownFailurePatterns.detection: test-verification-probe-of-probe.js lacks required mutation cases or fixtures do not cover every Level 4 task pack.

promotionHistory.evidence: Task matrix defines mandatory reads, evidence commands, artifacts, and handoff blockers for project and generic routes.

promotionHistory.changeType: known failure patterns and mandatory blind-spot probe
promotionHistory.evidence: Default loop runs probe-verification-orchestrator-blind-spots.js after target PASS and blocks missing harness detectors.
Loop fixtures prove target repair, verifier improvement, immediate block on failed improve command, and max-attempt exhaustion.

promotionHistory.changeType: task-specific verifier packs with sample regression
promotionHistory.evidence: Task packs and resolver fixtures cover code-change, slide-deck, pptx-deck, schedule-plan, document-review, ops-checklist, and generic fallback.

Negative fixtures and in-memory mutation tests prove the blind-spot probe fails when task packs lose blindSpotPatterns, sampleTasks, sample detector links, verificationAxes, repairStrategy, or improveStrategy.
